message:
test(e2e): expand search V3 stdio E2E to 27 cases / 84 assertions (br-2tnl.7.8)

Covers: exact match, phrase, prefix, boolean AND/OR/NOT, result shape
validation, limit enforcement (1/3/default/1000/negative), empty query,
thread-scoped content, importance content, multi-word matching,
case-insensitive search, SQL injection safety, unicode handling,
zero-result query, assistance field, product search (basic + cross-project),
relevance ordering, ack-required content, body content search, batch
multi-query, and sender-specific content query.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
